keywords: concrete anchors, masonry fasteners, wedge anchors, sleeve anchors, drop-in anchors, concrete bolt types

body.en: Concrete anchors are mechanical fasteners designed to secure objects to concrete, brick, or masonry surfaces. The most common types include wedge anchors, sleeve anchors, drop-in anchors, and concrete screws. Wedge anchors feature a expansion clip that locks into the concrete when the nut is tightened, making them ideal for heavy-duty applications. Sleeve anchors use a sleeve that expands against the walls of the drilled hole, suitable for medium loads. Drop-in anchors are internally threaded and set with a setting tool, providing a flush surface. Concrete screws (Tapcon-style) cut threads into the base material and can be removed and reinstalled. For construction projects across Africa and the Middle East, selecting the right anchor type depends on the base material condition, load requirements, and whether the application is temporary or permanent. Always consider the concrete's compressive strength — anchors perform differently in cracked versus uncracked concrete.
body.zh: 混凝土锚栓是设计用于将物体固定在混凝土、砖块或砌体表面的机械紧固件。最常见类型包括楔形锚栓、套管锚栓、预置锚栓和混凝土螺钉。楔形锚栓具有膨胀夹片，拧紧螺母时锁入混凝土中，适用于重载应用。套管锚栓使用套管膨胀抵靠钻孔壁，适合中等载荷。预置锚栓内螺纹，用专用工具安装，表面平整。混凝土螺钉切削基材螺纹，可拆卸重装。对于非洲和中东的建筑项目，选择正确锚栓类型取决于基材状况、载荷要求及临时/永久应用。

body.en: Understanding load capacity is critical when specifying concrete anchors. Each anchor type has rated values for tension (pull-out) and shear (lateral) loads. These values depend on anchor diameter, embedment depth, concrete strength, and edge distance. As a general rule, embedment depth should be at least 4 to 6 times the anchor diameter for optimal performance. Minimum edge distance is typically 12 times the anchor diameter, and minimum spacing between anchors should be 10 times the diameter. For projects in regions with seismic activity, such as parts of East Africa, anchors must meet additional requirements for cracked concrete. Always apply a safety factor of 4:1 for static loads and 8:1 for dynamic or shock loads. When ordering anchors in bulk for construction projects, specify the required proof load values and request mill test certificates to verify material compliance.
body.zh: 了解载荷能力对于指定混凝土锚栓至关重要。每种锚栓都有拉伸（拉出）和剪切（横向）载荷额定值。这些值取决于锚栓直径、埋入深度、混凝土强度和边距。一般规则：埋入深度至少为锚栓直径的4-6倍。最小边距通常为直径的12倍，锚栓间距最小为直径的10倍。对于有地震活动的地区（如东非部分地区），锚栓必须满足开裂混凝土的额外要求。静态载荷安全系数4:1，动态载荷8:1。大批量订购时需指定验证载荷值并要求工厂测试证书。

body.en: Proper installation is the most important factor in anchor performance. Begin by selecting the correct drill bit — for mechanical anchors, use a carbide-tipped masonry bit matching the anchor diameter exactly. For concrete screws, use the manufacturer-recommended bit size, which is typically slightly smaller. Drill the hole to the required depth plus 10mm for dust clearance. Clean the hole thoroughly using a wire brush and compressed air or a blow-out bulb — dust residue can reduce anchor capacity by up to 50%. For wedge anchors, insert the anchor through the fixture, then tighten the nut to the specified torque. For sleeve anchors, the same through-hole method applies. Drop-in anchors require setting the anchor first, then threading the bolt. In hot climates common in Africa and the Middle East, concrete temperatures can exceed 60°C during curing, which may affect anchor performance. Schedule anchor installation after the concrete has cured for at least 28 days and has cooled to ambient temperature. For more information, also see our guides on [anchor bolts](/en/industry/anchor-bolts-foundation-guide), [concrete screws](/en/industry/concrete-screws-anchors-guide), [quality standards](/en/industry/fastener-quality-control-iso9001).
body.zh: 正确安装是锚栓性能最重要的因素。首先选择正确的钻头——机械锚栓使用与锚栓直径完全匹配的碳化钨砌体钻头。混凝土螺钉使用制造商推荐的略小钻头。钻孔深度为要求深度加10mm用于除尘。彻底清洁孔洞——灰尘残留可使锚栓承载能力降低50%。楔形锚栓穿过固定件插入后拧紧螺母至指定扭矩。套管锚栓方法相同。预置锚栓先安装再拧螺栓。非洲和中东炎热气候下，混凝土养护期间温度可超60°C，影响锚栓性能。应在混凝土养护28天后且冷却至环境温度时安装。 欲了解更多，请参阅我们的指南：地脚螺栓基础安装完整指南：建筑结构锚固, 混凝土螺钉和锚栓指南：混凝土、砖块和砌块的安全固定, ISO 9001:2015下的紧固件质量控制 — 从原材料到出货。

q.en: Can I install anchors in wet concrete?
q.zh: 可以在湿混凝土中安装锚栓吗？

a.en: No. Mechanical anchors must be installed in fully cured concrete (minimum 28 days). Wet or green concrete does not provide adequate compressive strength for reliable anchor performance.
a.zh: 不可以。机械锚栓必须在完全养护的混凝土中安装（至少28天）。湿混凝土或未充分养护的混凝土抗压强度不足，无法提供可靠的锚栓性能。

q.en: What if the anchor spins when I tighten the nut?
q.zh: 拧紧螺母时锚栓旋转怎么办？

a.en: This usually means the hole is oversized or the anchor is not properly expanded. Remove the anchor, redrill with the correct bit size if needed, and reinstall. Never overtighten as this can damage the expansion mechanism.
a.zh: 通常意味着孔径过大或锚栓未正确膨胀。取出锚栓，必要时用正确尺寸钻头重新钻孔后重新安装。切勿过度拧紧，以免损坏膨胀机构。

q.en: What are Technical Guide and how are they used?

a.en: Technical Guide are essential components in construction and manufacturing. Proper selection depends on load requirements, environmental conditions, and material compatibility.

q.en: How do I choose the right fastener for my project?

a.en: Consider the material being fastened, load requirements, environmental exposure, and applicable standards. Consult with a professional if unsure about specifications.

q.en: What materials are available for these fasteners?

a.en: Common materials include carbon steel, stainless steel, alloy steel, and specialty alloys. Each offers different strength, corrosion resistance, and cost characteristics.
Yes, we offer custom fastener manufacturing to spec. Contact our sales team with your requirements for pricing and lead times.
